signals.headline: Powell Confirms He Will Remain Fed Chair Pro Tem Until Successor Confirmed, Amid Ongoing Investigation and Unchanged Rat
signals.raw:
Powell Confirms He Will Remain Fed Chair Pro Tem Until Successor Confirmed, Amid Ongoing Investigation and Unchanged Rates** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1][2][3][4][5]

Jerome Powell stated he will serve as chair pro tem if his successor—nominee Kevin Warsh—is not Senate-confirmed by his May 15 term end, per federal law and precedent[1][2][3][4]. He also affirmed no intention to leave the Fed
